name: Printed Pumpkin Halloween Baby Blanket - Cloud Island™
description:
Wrap your precious bundle of joy in cozy comfort with this Printed Pumpkin Baby Blanket from Cloud Island™. Made from 100% recycled polyester fabric, this baby blanket feels soft, warm and comfortable against their skin. It features allover pumpkin print on a cream backdrop for sweet style and makes a great gift for baby showers or first birthdays.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
